name: Chicken and Barley Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a vigorous boil in a medium saucepan over high heat.
2. Stir in barley; return to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 8-10 minutes or until barley is tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain if necessary; cool.
4. Toss barley with remaining ingredients except lettuce.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE; CHO: 24g; PRO: 19g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 213
